name: Kenya-Tanzania Migori River Basin Coordination
notes: Migori River originates in Tanzania. Cross-border flood management requires bilateral protocol. EAC framework exists but Kenya-Tanzania Migori-specific agreement unsigned.

name: Migori Town Drainage Upgrade
notes: Phase 1 drainage collectors installed 2022. Phase 2 secondary network not procured. Design revised after Phase 1 identified undersized inlets.

name: Migori County Flood Early Warning
notes: System designed. Budget allocated centrally not released to county. Procurement stalled at national level.

name: Awendo-Migori Riparian Compliance
blocking_factor: Cross-border complexity and weak county enforcement capacity
notes: Riparian buffer mapped. Kenya-side enforcement hampered by Tanzania-side land use changes upstream. County NEMA office understaffed.
